title: Canopy Growth or Tilray Brands: Which Stock Is More Likely to Be a Millionaire Maker?
text: The Motley Fool concludes that Tilray Brands is the better choice between the two, though neither stock is likely to produce millionaire returns. Tilray Brands advantages: Greater operational diversification, including craft brewing operations and hemp-based products. Presence across multiple important markets (U.S., Germany, Portugal). Stronger gross margin (23.71% vs. 18.25%). Revenue growth of 3% year-over-year. Canopy Growth advantages: Significant improvement in bottom-line losses (down to -$0.13 per share from -$0.81). Benefits from Trump's executive order reclassifying cannabis as Schedule III. Leading position in Canadian market. Both companies face substantial headwinds: cannabis remains federally illegal in the U.S., and even if that changes, they'll contend with regulatory oversight, stiff competition, oversupply, and others. The analyst's recommendation: Stay away from both stocks, but if forced to choose, select Tilray.
